experience.description: Leading end-to-end development of MAP Growth on Ed integration platform, delivering production-ready microservices serving thousands of concurrent users with exceptional performance and reliability.
responsibilities: Delivered MAP Growth on Ed integration platform end-to-end with Hasura GraphQL backend and Spring Boot action handlers
Migrated a 600+ package monorepo from Babel to SWC, cutting build times by 65-70% and improving DX
Led migration from GHES to GHEC, rebuilding CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions
Integrated real-time classroom systems with third-party solutions to elevate engagement at scale
Enhanced monorepo developer experience for microfrontends via webpack and build optimizations
Developed robust session management services using GraphQL and PostgreSQL with production-ready observability
achievements: Achieved 8,250+ RPS with 3,456+ concurrent users at 50% resource utilization via connection pooling and query optimization
Zero critical production incidents since launch with sub-second P99 response times under peak load
Reduced monorepo build times by 65-70% through the Babel to SWC migration, saving hundreds of developer hours monthly
Migrated the org from GHES to GHEC with zero downtime while rebuilding CI/CD pipelines on GitHub Actions
Created a reusable hasura-client-map package with React hooks, standardizing GraphQL patterns across teams

experience.description: Responsible for frontend ED Platform and RCE product development, implementing critical features and infrastructure improvements that enhanced system reliability and developer productivity.
responsibilities: Implemented session management and insights collection for ED Platform and RCE, enabling real-time analytics
Migrated universal analytics to GA4 across products to maintain measurement continuity
Created and deployed Concourse pipelines for backend automation to improve release reliability
Deployed session management service to Kubernetes with health checks, resource limits, and autoscaling
Migrated the monorepo to PNPM, cutting build time by ~50% and improving dependency management
achievements: Reduced build times by ~50% through the PNPM migration, improving developer productivity
Migrated all products to GA4 ahead of the Universal Analytics sunset with zero tracking gaps
Established modern CI/CD practices with Concourse pipelines that became team standard
